testcase.name: bookSpot returns SUCCESS for first booking by user
freeSpot returns FREED and increments freeSpots
last spot taken makes parking full for next user
user can book again after freeing their spot
bookSpot stores booking record with correct userId and parkingId
two different users can each book a spot in the same lot
freeSpot returns NOT_BOOKED when user has no active booking
bookSpot returns PARKING_FULL when no spots available
ALREADY_BOOKED result does not change freeSpots
only the booking user can free their spot - other user gets NOT_BOOKED
user can book a spot in a different parking lot
bookSpot returns ALREADY_BOOKED when user already has spot in this lot
freeSpot removes booking record so getBooking returns null
freeSpot does not change freeSpots when user has no booking
